hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "Session-collab ready. Start only for non-trivial/multi-session edits (restore_context default false). Batch claims; memory = short highlights."}'
echo '{"systemMessage": "Save important findings: collab_memory_save (pinned=true). Then collab_session_end."}'
echo '{"systemMessage": "Context compaction. Save critical info: collab_memory_save (pinned=true)."}'
